---
title: "Project Submission"
---

## 📌 Term Project Submission

### 🌐 Website URL

👉 <https://saurabh-parate.github.io/>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 💻 GitHub Repository

👉 <https://github.com/saurabh-parate/saurabh-parate.github.io>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📄 Description

This portfolio website was built using Quarto to showcase my experience in **Digital Marketing and Marketing Analytics**.

The website includes: - Digital Marketing projects and experience\
- Marketing Analytics project (Ontario Airport analysis)\
- Website traffic analytics dashboard using Google Analytics and Looker Studio\
- Resume and professional profile

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🎯 Target Audience

The website is designed for: - Recruiters\
- Hiring managers\
- Organizations looking for data-driven marketing professionals

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🛠 Tools Used

- Quarto\
- R (dplyr, ggplot2)\
- Google Analytics 4\
- Looker Studio\
- Google Ads & Meta Ads
